## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` — zero issues
- [ ] `flutter test` — zero failures
- [ ] `dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs` — generated files committed if changed
- [ ] `dart run tool/generate_codemap.dart` — CODEMAP.md updated if `lib/` structure changed
- [ ] `bash scripts/check_design_system.sh` — passes
- [ ] `bash scripts/check_architecture.sh` — passes
- [ ] `flutter build web` — succeeds
- [ ] Visual proof attached (screenshots or screen recording for UI changes)
- [ ] PR title uses [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) with lowercase subject
